assessment.note: She names communication feedback that 'landed' but is still being processed, which signals a mild hit to confidence/energy and some uncertainty about how her impact is coming across.

new_queue.label: Communication feedback
new_queue.name: That communication feedback — what part of it are you still processing?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific feedback thread she just named to locate the real blocker.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Support shape
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?
new_queue.description: Lets her define the most useful manager help without assuming the fix.

new_queue.label: Steadier finish
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or friction without opening new topics.
